source.query:
select * from raw.r_hashtag
where ("IsForCorpMember" = True OR "IsForIndivMember" = True) and "Status" = True;

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT * FROM dbo.Hashtag
WHERE IsForCorpMember = 1 OR IsForIndivMember = 1;

scripts.text:
TRUNCATE TABLE iclub.dim_salute_type;
INSERT INTO iclub.dim_salute_type (id, code, name)
SELECT 
    a.id,
    v.code,
    v.name
FROM (VALUES 
    ('0', '(Please select)'),
    ('1', 'Ir'),
    ('2', 'Sr'),
    ('3', 'Ar.'),
    ('4', 'Prof.'),
    ('5', 'Dr.'),
    ('6', 'Mr.'),
    ('7', 'Mrs.'),
    ('8', 'Ms.'),
    ('9', 'Miss')
) AS v(code, name)
LEFT JOIN app.dim_title AS a 
    ON a.name = v.name
ON CONFLICT (code) DO NOTHING;

TRUNCATE TABLE iclub.dim_account_status;

INSERT INTO
    iclub.dim_account_status (id, code, name)
SELECT a.id, v.code, v.name
FROM (VALUES
    ('0', 'Pending'),
    ('1', 'Active'),
    ('2', 'Expired'),
    ('3', 'Inactive')
    ) AS v (code, name)
    JOIN app.dim_account_status AS a ON a.name = v.name
ON CONFLICT (code) DO NOTHING;

TRUNCATE TABLE iclub.dim_preferred_language;

INSERT INTO
    iclub.dim_preferred_language (id, code, name)
SELECT a.id, v.code, v.name
FROM (VALUES     
    ('en-hk', 'English'),
    ('zh-hk', 'Chinese (Traditional)'),
    ('zh-cn', 'Chinese (Simplified)')
    ) AS v (code, name)
    JOIN app.dim_language AS a ON a.name = v.name
ON CONFLICT (code) DO NOTHING;

TRUNCATE TABLE iclub.dim_organisation_nature_category;

INSERT INTO
    iclub.dim_organisation_nature_category (id, code, name)
SELECT a.id, v.code, v.name
FROM (VALUES     
    ('1', 'Academic Institution'),
    ('2', 'Project Client (Developer/Estate Office/NGO/Statutory Body)'),
    ('3', 'Consultant'),
    ('4', 'Contractor'),
    ('5', 'Government'),
    ('6', 'Manufacturer/Supplier/Startup'),
    ('7', 'Professional Body'),
    ('8', 'Property Management Company'),
    ('9', 'Research Body'),
    ('10', 'Trade Association'),
    ('11', 'Utility Organisation'),
    ('12', 'Freelance'),
    ('13', 'Others')
    ) AS v (code, name)
    JOIN app.dim_category AS a ON a.name = v.name
ON CONFLICT (code) DO NOTHING;

ON CONFLICT (code) DO NOTHING;

TRUNCATE TABLE iclub.r_hashtag_uat;
INSERT INTO iclub.r_hashtag_uat
SELECT 
    a.id as id_uuid,
    "Id",
    "EnTitle",
    "TcTitle",
    "ScTitle",
    "IsForCorpMember",
    "IsForIndivMember",
    "IsForExpertCorner",
    "IsForEvent",
    "IsForExhibit",
    "Sequence",
    "Status",
    "CreatedBy",
    "CreatedDate",
    "UpdatedBy",
    "UpdatedDate", 
     adf_datetime
FROM iclub.r_hashtag as V
LEFT JOIN app.dim_preference AS a 
on a.name = V."EnTitle"
where V."Status"= True
and a.id is not null;


TRUNCATE TABLE iclub.r_hashtag;
INSERT INTO iclub.r_hashtag
select * from iclub.r_hashtag_uat;
